title: Verify --complexity low override forces 4 stages
description: Verify that @kody --complexity low forces a 4-stage pipeline (taskify→build→verify→ship) regardless of the task's detected complexity, and that logs show 'Complexity override: low'. The verification is confirmed by the pipeline run showing 'Complexity override: low' in logs with 4 stages completing.
existing_patterns: kody.yml orchestrate job: runs kody-engine via `kody-engine $(kody-engine ci-build-args)` with MODE and COMPLEXITY env vars
test-suite agent.md P1T01: 'complexity=LOW, 4 stages run, PR created' — same 4-stage low-complexity behavior
test-suite agent.md P1T02: 'complexity=MEDIUM, 6+ stages run' — medium/high complexity runs full pipeline
test-suite agent.md P1T37 hotfix: 'only 3 stages run (build/verify/ship)' — confirms stage-count varies by mode
kody-test-suite.md T05 verification: 'Complexity override: low. taskify→build→verify→ship (4 stages only)' — identical test to P3T10
task.md for run 1324: ran all 6 stages (taskify/plan/build/verify/review/review-fix) on a non-low-complexity task, confirming plan/review stages are skipped for low complexity
